items.name: Blue Ice Oversized Sweater

Features a smooth gradient blue tone with soft fabric details, giving a cozy yet fashionable vibe for any avatar.

Perfect for casual outfits, aesthetic styles, and urban fashion combinations.
Designed to fit seamlessly on Roblox avatars and elevate your everyday look.

✔ Oversized streetwear style
✔ Smooth blue gradient design
✔ High-quality UGC clothing
